title: Arbitrary manual live contradiction fall-through
problem: ticket-129 proved live relationship drafting for arbitrary manual_text sources. NM-4 pipeline still stops before contradiction detection; detect-contradictions uses checksum-pinned mock fixtures for synthnote and generic diversity fallback for unknown manual_text.
acceptance_criteria: After live extract + link + build-relationships on an unmapped manual_text source, explicit live mode can detect contradictions via Ollama.
At least one validated contradiction or explicit no-contradiction result persists to the gitignored evidence DB.
Checksum-pinned synthnote mock paths remain deterministic.
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
rollback_plan: Remove live contradiction fall-through flag; retain ticket-127/128/129 calibration.
